summary: Patched scripts/aggregate_parallel_eval.py to force secondary variant question files and case payloads into diagnostic_only rank scope.

accepted_fields_or_changes: Detect question file names containing secondary variant markers.
Inspect question files for variant_claim, secondary diagnostic_label, or promotion_blocker markers.
Set quality_status=diagnostic_secondary_variant and rank_scope=diagnostic_only before normal scoreboard rules.
needs_orchestrator_review: Run aggregate smoke on a synthetic full-quality row.
